settings.title: Cycladic Double
settings.summary: A bright, serene double with a vaulted ceiling and a terrace shaded by bougainvillea.
settings.description:
The Cycladic Double is a study in island calm — smooth white walls, a curved sleeping alcove and a stone terrace where breakfast arrives each morning.

Perfect for couples, it pairs everyday comfort with the quiet drama of the caldera just beyond the railing.
settings.rates:
Low season (Apr–May, Oct) | €180
Mid season (Jun, Sep) | €240
High season (Jul–Aug) | €320
settings.rates_note: Rates include breakfast and all taxes. Minimum 2 nights in high season.
settings.seo_description: A serene Cycladic double room with a private bougainvillea terrace in Oia.
